MadCow: Psychedelic, Beatnik, Rock, Folk and Blues – Welcome to MadCow Music! New Original Psychedelic Beatnik Music. Lots of psychedelic beatnik MP3 songs available to stream for free! And tune in for more. New release: Relic of Fortune: March 2026, also check out the psychedelic version in the "Deep Cuts," section. Previously released: Hamburg," A groovy song about four lads from liverpool who went to Hamburg, Germany. Guess who they are? Also new February 2026: New " A Drop of Creation," Wow, like an ocean in a drop! Cool! January 2026: " Let me take you there." Also, new mix V5 version : Let me take you there," 01/27/2026!! Wow man, lots of ancient Roman art just lying on the ground. to be found, and rediscovered!! So cool! The mozaic artwork that foretells the future and the past! What will it reveal? What does it mean? Also check out December 2025: "Limited Hangout." Wow man, lets go to Jamaica and play Dominoes!! Chill out! Beautiful Caribbean ocean! Clean air! And the dolphins are playing and jumping man! Previous new release November: "Leaf in a Creek." September: " Celestial Circle. Also, check out new deep cuts: December 2025: "Flip the Coin." Time to transcend! Relax, float, be free! It's now Winter 2025! We can see the amazing, ice blue colors: the ice formations, the snow!! And , of course, the rainbow hues. The greens, orange and blues, the rainbow hues! Yes, feel the cool earth 432 harmonic vibrations! Also, check out: We Are The Lights: release date 01-01-2025! Listen for free to our MP3 songs below.Check out the MP3:"Psychedelic Maestro." Take the Spiritual Journey! Also new: "Odysseus." Time travel for 10 years! Super cool! Check out the MP3 song, "The Hologram." The Hologram is the ultimate! No matter how many times you divide, you still have all the essence of the hologram! Freaky man! The Crucible is a cool, groovy song about terraforming and interplanetary colonization! Be curious. Ask questions. Is everything in the universe really one large hologram? Can we terraform planets now? Wow! Enjoy, adventure, journey and ask questions! Also, as a bonus: check out the MadCow deep cuts section! MadCow’s top MP3 songs with vocals only! Also, for more psychedelic beatnik music go to : psychedelicbeatnik.com. Enjoy! Ready to listen to some MP3? Just scroll down and start streaming or read more about what we are about! MadCow is always striving for cool lyrics and psychedelic sounds with a beatnik hybrid feel. Ride on man! So cool, the original USA based band: MadCow, aka, Mad Cow. Get going man! Do your thing! It's the fall season 2025. Get your song book and guitar and head out into nature. Create, write, be an artist! So, put on your kaleidoscope glasses and take the journey with oranges, greens, yellows and blues and rainbow hues!! Peace, harmony and love to all humanity! Enjoy the psychedelic beatnik music by the featured band: MadCow © (1998-2025).
